global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with a clear promotional message.
global.main_message: Promoting a sale with discounts and free shipping.

elements.label: Purple background
elements.description: A solid purple background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Up to 40% off' prominently displayed in the center.

elements.label: Mirror product image
elements.description: A simple line drawing of two mirrors, positioned centrally within the ad.

elements.label: Additional product image
elements.description: A secondary line drawing of a product, slightly offset from the first mirror.

elements.label: Shipping offer text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the main offer stating 'Free shipping over $25'.
elements.text_content: Up to 40% off Free shipping over $25

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'VantaStyle' displayed in a small white font at the top left corner.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded white button at the bottom center with the text 'Get offer' in bold.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow circular badge at the top right corner with the text 'SALE'.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small white tag at the top left corner with the text 'UGC'.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, main offer text, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centered, the product images are in the middle, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: VantaStyle, Up to 40% off, Free shipping over $25, Get offer, SALE, UGC
